arts.ttl: Chelsea, Man Utd, Liverpool and Tottenham FA Cup dates revealed as fourth round TV schedule is announced
arts.sum: Some intriguing ties will take place in the fourth round of the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Manchester United striker joins Wigan Athletic old-boys' network at Carlisle United
arts.sum: Joe Hugill has joined League Two strugglers Carlisle United on loan from Manchester United following his recall from Wigan Athletic.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic secure January addition No.5 on loan
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic have added leadership and experience to their engine room for the rest of the season following the loan capture of Blackpool midfielder Ollie Norburn.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic: The 12th Man - 'This could be a valuable missing piece of the Wigan Athletic jigsaw...'
arts.sum: Our panel of Latics experts reflect on FA Cup progression in midweek ahead of this weekend’s long trip down to Stevenage...when vital league points will be up for grabs...

arts.ttl: Luke Robinson on righting a wrong at Wigan Athletic - and 'setting the standard'
arts.sum: Luke Robinson says Wigan Athletic will be aiming to make up for two dropped points when they travel down to Stevenage this weekend.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic to snap up 32-year-old to bolster ranks
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic are set to sign Ollie Norburn from Blackpool, according to journalist Alan Nixon on his Patreon… The post Wigan Athletic to snap up 32-year-old to bolster ranks appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic starlet 'won't rule anything out...top six is a demand, not a dream...'
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic 'should not be where we are in the League One table' - and a play-off should remain a 'demand, not a dream'.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic boss praises 'incredibly respectful' attitude ahead of Stevenage trip
arts.sum: Shaun Maloney insists he has no worries whatsoever about the effect of January transfer talk on Wigan Athletic's talisman Thelo Aasgaard.

Stevenage have been building some momentum of late with one defeat in nine matches keeping them comfortably in the middle of the League One table. The Boro's last three wins all came at home. Wigan ...
